[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 01111001 5
1 10111100 5
2 01111010 5
3 01111011 6
4 10001010 3
5 10111000 4
6 11011011 6
7 10010001 3

01 10 10001000 2
12 21 10011000 3
23 32 10010001 3 match 7
34 43 00000001 1
45 54 00000011 2
56 65 01000010 2
67 76 01111010 5 match 2
70 07 00001010 2

02 20 10001010 3 match 4
13 31 10010000 2
24 42 00000011 2
35 53 10000001 2
46 64 00000010 1
57 75 01000011 3
60 06 00001010 2
71 17 00111000 3

03 30 10000000 1
14 41 00000000 a
25 52 11000011 4
36 63 00010000 1
47 74 00000011 2
50 05 10000010 2
61 16 00111000 3
72 27 01011011 5

04 40 00000010 1
15 51 10000000 1
26 62 01011010 4
37 73 00010001 2
